title: Whole user-space relational graph and identity model defined
objective: Define the PostgreSQL + RuVector schemas, stable identities, temporal relations, content addressing, metadata, binary references, permissions, provenance, and graph edges that represent the entire user-space with lossless round-trip keys under the STORE-001 store relationship, covering files, directories, code modules, configuration, planning tables, communications, application state, media and blob references, identities, permissions, history, relationships, and domain records.

work_items.decision: Unified fs_node table (node_kind file|directory|symlink) with (root_id, relative_path) natural key, parent_id containment edge, module_path/ordinal for deterministic projection, and blob_ref (SHA-256) for file content; round-trips to exact tree and bytes via envctl exact-byte materialization.

AST-fragment rows carrying raw_code + raw_code_sha256, module_path + ordinal, RuVector semantic_embedding, and COW branch/status; concatenation by (module_path, ordinal) regenerates the exact source file per blueprint Phase 4.
Non-secret config rows keyed by (config_scope, config_key); secret-valued config carries a keyring secret_ref only, never the value (STORE-001 external-secret class).
Task/anchor/decision/proof/status rows keyed by (record_type, external_id) with a projection_target; deterministic CSV/document projection contract is elaborated downstream in POSTGRES-003.

Thread-ordered (thread_id, seq_no) messages with body_sha256 and attachment blob references; only settled/significant agent traces flush forward from redb, transient thoughts stay redb-local (STORE-001-B boundary).

Settled UI/session/agent/swarm state keyed by (state_scope, state_key, principal_id); redb is the microsecond scratchpad/WAL, envctl flushes only settled execution trees forward; LifeOS reads live state via UDS from redb.

work_items.owner: PostgreSQL PgStore (blob family), redb source-blob store transitional
work_items.decision: Content-addressed BlobStore keyed by SHA-256 (content is its own identity); all binary payloads referenced by hash, migrated redb->PgStore only after a green blobstore_parity.rs run under one identity (STORE-001 'Verified cutover').

user|account|agent|service|node principals with (principal_type, external_ref) natural key; provider accounts (anthropic|openai|gemini) and agent .rvf ids carry credential_ref keyring handles, never credential values; seeded by the one-time account.json migration.
principal x resource x capability grant rows; deny is absence of grant; revocation is a new revision (valid_to set), preserving full permission history; grants reference secrets by handle only.
Append-only temporal spine recording before/after SHA-256, COW branch lineage, SHAKE256 witness_chain, and ESN merge scores; PITR + revision chain reconstruct any point-in-time or branch state.

Typed directed edges (contains|depends_on|calls|causal|belongs_to_domain|...) with weight for MinCut and RuVector semantic_embedding for GNN causal verification; edges lacking a historical root are rejected.

Whole-life records across the four North Star domains (company|personal|development|home) keyed by (domain, record_type, external_id), unified into one coherent whole via belongs_to_domain graph edges (NS-WHOLE).

completion_gate: The model in generated/postgres_user_space_schema_plan.json covers files, directories, code modules, configuration, planning tables, communications, application state, media and blob references, identities, permissions, history, relationships, and domain records, each assigned exactly one PostgreSQL + RuVector canonical owner with a lossless round-trip key under the STORE-001 store relationship, and POSTGRES-002.proof.json records that no live schema or user data was touched.
